issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing credentials or network failures.
The skill assumes Node.js, Docker, GitHub Actions, and Kubernetes, limiting its applicability across all AI agents.

scenarios.name: Replace shared .env files with Infisical for a Node service
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `npm install -g @infisical/cli`, `infisical login`, `infisical init`, and runs the app with `infisical run -- npm start` (and `--env=production`) per the skill's CLI flow; baseline reached for generic vaults/dotenv-vault without the specific CLI/run-injection pattern.

scenarios.name: Sync Infisical secrets into a Kubernetes Secret
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the documented `InfisicalSecret` CRD (`apiVersion: secrets.infisical.com/v1alpha1`) with `hostAPI`, `universalAuth.credentialsRef`, `managedSecretReference`, and `resyncInterval`; baseline used External Secrets Operator or stringData manifests instead of the Infisical operator.
